rationale: ShowX-3.1 hotfix bundle authorized 2026-06-06 by Architect per Jindřich's request. Three task specs addressing critical Cuelist UI gaps: Routing+Devices UI (B003-101), Real-time playhead broadcast via Yjs awareness (B003-102), Demo show fixture + first-launch picker with Open Demo/Open Existing/New From Scratch flow (B003-103). Bundle decision note: docs/agent_exchange/bundles/ShowX-3-1-hotfix.md. Forge picks tasks in lowest-ID order; all 3 are independent (no inter-deps).
